title: Chisel The Stone!
description: This mod aims to make building with blocks that have chiseled and brick variants with the help of a new tool - The Chisel
body:
🛠️ Chisel The Stone!

Sculpt your world, one block at a time.

Turn plain old blocks into something extraordinary with just a right-click! Chisel The Stone! brings a smooth and immersive way to transform your building materials directly in-game using a custom chisel tool. No crafting menus. No fuss. Just click, chisel, and create.

🔨 Features:

Right-click any supported block with the chisel to cycle between:

Base Block → Chiseled → Brick Variant

(Supports blocks like Stone, Tuff, Quartz, Deepslate, and more!)

Works seamlessly in Survival and Creative modes

     Balanced tool durability and smooth animation


Note : The Chisel Tool only works on blocks that are placed by the player, and not naturally generated ones.
           This prevents players from farming stone bricks/chiseled stone bricks from naturally generated stone.

Contact : MrMisc29 on Discord. MrMisc29 on YouTube
